messages.subject: Welcome to the Portal - Please review important updates
messages.body: Welcome to the portal. Please review the latest updates and guidelines. Visit our Help Center for more information or check out the Getting Started Guide.

messages.subject: Your support ticket #12345 has been resolved
messages.body: Your support ticket has been resolved. Please review the resolution details and let us know if you need any further assistance.

messages.subject: Invoice #INV-2025-001 is ready
messages.body: Your invoice is ready for download. Click here to view your invoice or visit the Billing Dashboard.

messages.subject: Scheduled maintenance this weekend
messages.body: Please be aware of scheduled maintenance on Saturday from 2am-6am EST. For more details, visit our System Status Page. If you have questions, please review our Maintenance FAQ.

messages.subject: Benefits enrollment deadline approaching
messages.body: Don't forget to complete your benefits enrollment by November 30th. Access the Benefits Enrollment Portal or download the Benefits Guide PDF.

messages.subject: Password reset required for compliance
messages.body: As part of our security policy, please reset your password within 7 days. Reset your password here. For security best practices, review our Security Guidelines.
